rdf:Description.dcterms:bibliographicCitation: Grassi, M, 2017., The American View of the “Forgotten Century” of Italian Painting. Reminescences of a Conservator and Art Dealer, in Buying Baroque: Italian Seventeenth-Century Paintings Come to America, a cura di E. Peters Boworon, University Park., Pennsylvania: The Pennsylvania State University Press,, pp. 40-53.
rdf:Description.dcterms:title: The American View of the “Forgotten Century” of Italian Painting. Reminescences of a Conservator and Art Dealer, in Buying Baroque: Italian Seventeenth-Century Paintings Come to America, a cura di E. Peters Boworon, University Park.
